game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **20 Minutes Till Dawn:** 20 Minutes Till Dawn is a top-down, rogue-lite survival shooter where players control a chosen hero who automatically fires their equipped weapon at incoming hordes of monsters. Players navigate the character using a virtual joystick or by dragging their finger across the screen, dodging enemy projectiles and melee attacks across a single arena map. After defeating a certain number of enemies or surviving timed waves, players are presented with a choice of 2-3 random upgrades from a pool of over 50 unique options, which can enhance weapon damage, fire rate, character health, or unlock new abilities, forming unique "builds" for each 10-20 minute run. The primary objective is to survive for the full 20-minute duration against continuously spawning and increasingly aggressive enemy types, with the game ending immediately if the player's health points drop to zero. Meta-progression involves unlocking new characters and weapons between runs, each offering distinct starting stats and upgrade synergies.
game_info.description: Survive for 20 minutes against endless waves of monsters! Control a hero who automatically fires at enemies. Dodge attacks, collect experience gems from defeated foes, and choose powerful upgrades every few levels. Build your character strategically to handle increasingly dangerous enemy hordes. Your health is precious—if it reaches zero, the run ends immediately!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your character in four directions
Space: Dash to dodge enemies (has cooldown)
Enter: Start the game from the start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause the game
R: Restart and return to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and combat test. Validates that the player can move, shoot enemies, collect experience, and survive basic enemy waves.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move in circular patterns to avoid enemies while letting auto-fire handle combat. Collect experience gems and select damage upgrades when available. Survive for at least 60 seconds.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves, shoots enemies, collects XP, levels up, and survives without taking excessive damage. Test passes if player survives 60+ seconds.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test. Implements an optimal survival strategy to reach the 20-minute victory condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use strategic movement to kite enemies, prioritize health and damage upgrades, utilize dash for emergency escapes, and maintain safe positioning while maximizing XP collection efficiency.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player reaches 20 minutes (1200 seconds) survival time and achieves GAME_OVER_WIN state. All game mechanics function correctly throughout the entire duration.

TEST_3.test_description: Upgrade system test. Validates that the upgrade selection and application system works correctly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Focus on leveling up quickly by aggressive XP collection. Select various upgrade types to ensure they all apply correctly. Monitor stat changes after each upgrade.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player successfully levels up multiple times, upgrade choices appear correctly, selected upgrades apply their effects, and stats increase as expected.

TEST_4.test_description: Dash mechanic test. Validates dash ability cooldown, invulnerability frames, and movement.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Repeatedly use dash ability to test cooldown timing. Intentionally dash through enemies to verify invulnerability frames. Test dash in all movement directions.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Dash moves player quickly, provides brief invulnerability, has appropriate cooldown, and can be used in all directions. No damage taken during dash invulnerability.
